mapper.select: SELECT m.*, COALESCE(su.nickname, su.username) AS sender_name, COALESCE(ru.nickname, ru.username) AS receiver_name FROM message m LEFT JOIN user su ON m.sender_id = su.id LEFT JOIN user ru ON m.receiver_id = ru.id WHERE m.sender_id = #{userId} AND (m.delete_by_sender IS NULL OR m.delete_by_sender = 0) ORDER BY m.create_time DESC

SELECT m.*, COALESCE(su.nickname, su.username) AS sender_name, COALESCE(ru.nickname, ru.username) AS receiver_name FROM message m LEFT JOIN user su ON m.sender_id = su.id LEFT JOIN user ru ON m.receiver_id = ru.id WHERE m.sender_id = #{senderId} AND (m.delete_by_sender IS NULL OR m.delete_by_sender = 0)
AND (m.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ru.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ru.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY m.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message m WHERE m.receiver_id = #{userId} AND (m.delete_by_receiver IS NULL OR m.delete_by_receiver = 0) AND m.status = 0
